title: AMQP 0-9-1 Model, Virtual Hosts, Exchanges, Queues, and Bindings · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs amqp 0-9-1 model, virtual hosts, exchanges, queues, and bindings from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the AMQP entity and routing graph. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for AMQP entity and routing graph after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles.
Use virtual hosts as separate topology and permission namespaces while recognizing they are not complete process or resource isolation.
Derive destination sets from exchange type, routing key, binding key, headers, and exchange-to-exchange bindings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Amqp Entity Model · changed case · Review Amqp Entity Model
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 6656 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Which action demonstrates Amqp Entity Model without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Amqp Entity Model · changed case · Review Amqp Entity Model.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Amqp Entity Model · changed case · Review Amqp Entity Model, keep Amqp Entity Model connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
